hooks.message: Before claiming visual design work is complete, confirm screenshot evidence and visual lint status.
hooks.reminder: For no-template visual work, preserve screenshots, console/request logs, visual-lint findings, and any accepted tradeoffs.

hooks.message: PowerPoint design claims need either rendered slide evidence or an explicit COM runner/session blocker.
hooks.reminder: If PowerPoint COM is unavailable, keep static reports and rerun only rendering/export from desktop-user or Office runner context.

hooks.message: Design-upskill changes should document what changed, why it matters, and how evidence verifies it.
hooks.reminder: Check impacted SKILL.md, PROVENANCE.md when applicable, README, and contract tests before committing.

hooks.message: Do not report COM-dependent validation as complete unless it actually ran in a COM-capable session.
hooks.reminder: Wrong-session/access errors such as 0x80070520 are environment failures; rerun in desktop/elevated PowerShell or the Office runner.

hooks.message: No-template visual artifacts need at least a basic accessibility check.
hooks.reminder: Review contrast, text size, image alt text, focus/labels when relevant, mobile tap spacing, and chart labels.
